items.title: INDIAN NAVAL SHIP TRIKAND CONCLUDES PORT CALL AT PORT VICTORIA, SEYCHELLES
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence INDIAN NAVAL SHIP TRIKAND CONCLUDES PORT CALL AT PORT VICTORIA, SEYCHELLES Maiden tri-services edition of Exercise Lamitiye 2026 between India and Seychelles Posted On: 22 MAR 2026 11:31AM by PIB Delhi Indian Naval Ship Trikand, a stealth frigate of the Indian Navy, has departed from Port Victoria, Seychelles, on 20 Mar 2026 on completion of an enriching port…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says, today, PM Shri Narendra Modi Ji becomes the longest-serving head of a government in India
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah says, today, PM Shri Narendra Modi Ji becomes the longest-serving head of a government in India PM Modi Ji breaks 8,930-day record of former Sikkim CM Pawan Kumar Chamling as head of a government PM Modi Ji's 8,931 days in public life reflect a deep dedication to nation-first governance, inte…

items.title: Bharat Electricity Summit 2026 Concludes with Strong Global Participation, Actionable Outcomes, and Roadmap for a Resilient, Future-ready Power Sector
